name: MAX
description: MAX messenger (max.ru) channel plugin for OpenClaw

max.label: MAX
max.description: MAX messenger (max.ru) channel plugin for OpenClaw

token.label: MAX Bot Token
token.help: MAX Bot API token from business.max.ru.

dmPolicy.label: DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Direct message access control: open, allowlist, or closed.

allowFrom.label: Allowed User IDs
allowFrom.help: MAX user IDs allowed to send DMs (when dmPolicy=allowlist).

groupPolicy.label: Group Policy
groupPolicy.help: Group chat access control: open, allowlist, or closed.

groupAllowFrom.label: Allowed Group User IDs
groupAllowFrom.help: MAX user IDs allowed in group chats (when groupPolicy=allowlist).

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.help: Optional webhook URL. Uses long polling if not set.

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.help: Optional secret for webhook request verification.
